name: agy-plugin
description: Use the Antigravity CLI (agy / Gemini) as a cheap subagent with cost discipline and verification gates.

plugins.name: agy-plugin
plugins.description: Routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, test generation, migrations, bulk reads, web research) to the Antigravity CLI (agy / Gemini) via a hardened wrapper with tiers, background jobs, structured failure codes, digest guards, and verification gates. The conductor keeps the judgement-heavy 20%.
